title: Better Than Basics
description: A modpack that preserves the minecraft style! | 1.20.1
body:
![The better than basics logo in front of a birch forest background](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a88e96b596903dcf340d41984274c97c1ea6430e.png)

This modpack was made with the intention of adding more content and depth to the game, without compromising on Minecraft's specific style!

- **Overhauled generation in the overworld, nether and end!**
- **Tons of new creatures to find, both friendly and hostile!**
- **Plenty of performance improvements!**
- **Dungeons and loot galore!**
- **Go crazy with Create or get closer to nature with Roots!**
- **Enjoy an overhauled combat system, with tons of weapons and spells to use!**
- **And so much more!**
